name: PCM5122
description: The `pcm5122` platform allows your ESPHome devices to use the PCM5122 high-performance stereo audio DAC. This allows the playback of audio via the microcontroller from a range of sources via [Speaker](https://esphome.io/components/speaker/) or [Media Player](https://esphome.io/components/media_player/).

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the device. Defaults to `0x4D`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the [I²C bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) the PCM5122 is connected to.

config_entries.label: Enable Pin
config_entries.description: GPIO pin connected to the PCM5122's XSMT (soft mute) pin. Held low during `setup()` and driven high once initialization succeeds. Omit if XSMT is hardwired high.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Analog Gain
config_entries.description: The analog output gain applied by the PCM5122. One of `0db` or `-6db`. Defaults to `0db`.

config_entries.label: Bits Per Sample
config_entries.description: The bit depth of the audio samples. One of `16bit`, `24bit`, or `32bit`. Defaults to `16bit`.

config_entries.label: Channel Mix
config_entries.description: How audio channel data is routed to the left and right outputs. One of:

options.label: Left channel data to both outputs.
Right channel data to both outputs.

config_entries.label: Volume Max Db
config_entries.description: The volume level that maps to the maximum volume (fully turned up). Must be greater than `volume_min_db`. Range: `-103.0dB` to `24.0dB`. Defaults to `0dB`.

config_entries.label: Volume Min Db
config_entries.description: The volume level that maps to the minimum volume (fully turned down). Must be less than `volume_max_db`. Range: `-103.0dB` to `24.0dB`. Defaults to `-52.5dB`.
